zh.Ashwell, Oakham, Rutland, England: 英國盧特藍德阿申維爾
zh.Markeaton, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾馬可亞頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell於1275年12月25日出生在英國爾布格拉福頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell32歲，母親Margaret30歲。他於大約1294年與Agnes d'Avesnes結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1337年在英國德比夏爾馬可亞頓享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell于1275年12月25日出生在英国爾布格拉福頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell32岁，母亲Margaret30岁。他于大约1294年与Agnes d'Avesnes结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1337年在英国德比夏爾馬可亞頓享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Touchet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Anastasie, Denys, Evest, Minos, Rodolph, Vernice.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by a small grove, from a diminutive of Old French toche ‘grove’.
History: René Touchet from Thorigné-d'Anjou in Maine-et-Loire, France, married Marie Caillé in Saint-Laurent, Île-de-Montreal, QC, in 1746.

variants.name: Touchette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Armand, Collette, Euclide, Henri, Hilaire, Huguette.
Altered form of French Touchet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell was born on 25 December 1275, in Buglawton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell, was 32 and his mother, Margaret, was 30. He married Agnes d'Avesnes about 1294. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1337, in Markeaton, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell est né le 25 décembre 1275, à Buglawton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Agnes d'Avesnes environ 1294. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1337, à Markeaton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell am 25. Dezember 1275 in Buglawton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell 32 und seine Mutter Margaret 30. Er hat um 1294 Agnes d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1337 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Markeaton, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell è nato il il 25 dicembre 1275 nel Buglawton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Agnes d'Avesnes circa 1294. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1337, nel Markeaton, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwellが1275年12月25日にイギリスチェシュアイアブグラウトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwellは32歳，母Margaretは30歳であった。約1294年にAgnes d'Avesnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1337年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアマーケアトンで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell(이)가 1275년 12월 25일 영국 체실르 버글로턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1294년 Agnes d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1337년 영국 더비실르 마크이턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1275, em Buglawton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes d'Avesnes aproximadamente 1294. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1337, em Markeaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell родился 25 декабря 1275 г. в местности буглавтон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes d'Avesnes около 1294 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1337 г. в местности маркитон, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Touchet III - Lord of Ashwell nació el 25 de diciembre de 1275, en Buglawton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Touchet Lord of Ashwell, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Agnes d'Avesnes aproximadamente 1294. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1337, en Markeaton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
